name: @freeside-auth/auth-sdk
description: Source-distributed svc-JWT verifier SDK for freeside-auth consumers. NOT an npm package — consumers vendor the src/ tree (shadcn-style 'add' pattern) per PRD v3.0 §11 post-verify lock-ins. Internal workspace name: @freeside-auth/auth-sdk. External vendored alias (per-consumer): @0xhoneyjar/auth. Sibling to @freeside-auth/identity-client (HTTP client); this is the crypto/verification SDK. See README.md §Vendoring.
